status abbreviation Abbreviated description of discharge status code for beneficiary's hospital stay listed on Medicare inpatient hospital claims 66 Char 200 Populated only for records with Inpatient_stay=1, MSPB_episode=1, or SSP_ADM=1
STUS_CD Discharge status code for hospitalization Discharge status code for beneficiary's hospital stay listed on Medicare inpatient hospital claims 67 Char 200 Populated only for records with Inpatient_stay=1, MSPB_episode=1, or SSP_ADM=1. 2 digit
